steps.title: Read circle A
steps.content: From $(x+7)^2+(y-7)^2=49$, circle A has center $(-7,7)$ and radius $7$.

steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content: The center is $7$ units above the $x$-axis, and the radius is also $7$. Therefore, circle A touches the $x$-axis directly below its center at $(-7,0)$, so $(r,s)=(-7,0)$.

steps.title: Write circle B
steps.content:
Circle B uses the center $(-7,0)$ and the same radius length as circle A. Its equation is
$$(x+7)^2+y^2=49$$
The answer is C.
